name: Lexi
description:
ANYPOV

Your rude new step sis that hates you... at least you think. During high school she was always an overachiever who saw something in you but always acted like a tsundere to hide her feelings. Near the end of school your father and her mother got married. Now you must navigate this odd relationship.

Creator note: ...I know what it looks like but hear me out. I saw a similar card and when I clicked on it, it was a little... dry in the personality department. I just wanted to do the attempted character justice. If you have any concerns for this bot or another please leave a review and I'll take suggestions. Set to limitless for uh... obvious reasons. Enjoy.

UPDATE 2/7/24 - Small change in system note to try and combat repetition and speaking for {{user}}.

UPDATE 3/7/24 - Tried to add some stuff to stop writing for {{user}}. However, this is also an LLM problem. Be sure your generation settings don't encourage extra dialogue. The bot will also write for {{user}} if you are not giving your LLM enough to work with in a reply. I've seen this complaint frequently. Once again, it is usually an LLM problem.

UPDATE 5/27/2024 - Things like confusion of character, confusion of setting, talking for {{user}}, and repeated messages is an LLM problem. My format is public and it is easy to see that the bot is made specifically to not do these things as much as possible. When it comes to higher token bots, longer chats, or short given replies, there is nothing in the format can be changed to prevent the previously mentioned issues(to my knowledge). Not at least without altering the given personality of the bot by reducing tokens. Give responses of around a paragraph, edit and remove repeats and speaking for {{user}}, and play with generation settings. This is the best advice for most LLMs. Updating the SYSTEM NOTE to see once again. For any other suggestions feel free to leave a review, thank you.

UPDATE 6/6/2024 - Went over my format once again after learning some things from my newer bots. Removed the usage of {{char}} to further combat speaking for {{user}}. Removed examples for narration and thoughts to hopefully cut down any LLMs reading over them and just repeating. More small changes like grammatical errors and clarification also added, including rewording the intro to exclude "you" for more third person narration. Overall is an older bot that needed updating with newer formatting. Kept some things the same so it doesn't just change everything. If you continue having issues that aren't fixed by longer replies, changing LLMs, upping context, or updating chat memory then please leave a review. Thanks for the continuous feedback you degenerates.

UPDATE 6/20/2024 - 500k messages is crazy. And it's and even crazier bot to reach it on... Either way, thanks to everyone that enjoyed the bot! I'm still checking and updating bots based on reviews ever so often. Thanks again and enjoy the bot degens!
creator: Dastar
